title: HIVE Blockchain Reports a Significant Jump in Annual Revenues and Earnings
text: HIVE Blockchain Technologies achieved remarkable financial growth in the fiscal year ended March 31, 2021. The company's mining revenue reached $66.7 million in the fiscal year ended March 31, 2021, which is up by approximately 174% compared to the prior year. The company swung from losses to profitability, reporting net income of $42.5 million versus a $1.9 million loss the previous year. Gross mining margins expanded significantly to $50.1 million from $8.5 million. During this period, HIVE mined 595 Bitcoin and over 96,300 Ethereum tokens. Frank Holmes, serving as Interim Executive Chairman, attributed the strong performance to operational improvements, including assuming direct control of mining facilities and acquiring Cryptologic Corp.'s Bitcoin cloud mining operation in Quebec. The company emphasized its strategy to improve efficiency and profitability across mining operations by optimizing cryptocurrency mining output while expanding capacity through new equipment installations.
